---
id: probe-an-agent-mcp-tool-server
title: "Probe an agent MCP tool server"
description: "Probe an external MCP server configured as an agent tool and return its tool names. The outbound call is routed through the SSRF-filtered safeHttp axios; all failure modes collapse to a single generic error so the response cannot be used for port or network reconnaissance."
sidebar_label: "Probe an agent MCP tool server"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api-reference/intellisper-documentation
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Probe an agent MCP tool server"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent-tools/mcp/validate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Probe an external MCP server configured as an agent tool and return its tool names. The outbound call is routed through the SSRF-filtered safeHttp axios; all failure modes collapse to a single generic error so the response cannot be used for port or network reconnaissance.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"schema":{"type":"string","pattern":"^[0-9a-zA-Z]{21}$"},"in":"path","name":"projectId","required":true}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["MCP"]},"toolName":{"type":"string","minLength":1},"serverUrl":{"type":"string","format":"uri"},"protocol":{"type":"string","enum":["sse","streamable-http","http"]},"auth":{"oneOf":[{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["none"]}},"required":["type"]},{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["access_token"]},"accessToken":{"type":"string"}},"required":["type","accessToken"]},{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["api_key"]},"apiKey":{"type":"string"},"apiKeyHeader":{"type":"string"}},"required":["type","apiKey","apiKeyHeader"]},{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","enum":["headers"]},"headers":{"type":"object","propertyNames":{"type":"string"},"additionalProperties":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["type","headers"]}]}},"required":["type","toolName","serverUrl","protocol","auth"]}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Default Response"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
